raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Utility Accountability and Wildfire Prevention Act of 2021 (AB 21) allows local authorities to bring actions against electrical companies for failing to comply with safety regulations.",
    "AB 21 permits the California Attorney General and local District Attorneys to take action against owners of electrical transmission lines not maintaining proper vegetation abatement.",
    "The Camp Fire in 2018 was caused by malfunctioning equipment that sparked overgrown vegetation.",
    "The Camp Fire resulted in 86 fatalities and the destruction of over 18,000 buildings.",
    "Proper, routine maintenance and vegetation abatement can help prevent devastating fires.",
    "Fines from actions against non-compliant electrical companies will be allocated to the Utility Accountability and Wildfire Prevention Fund."
  ]
}
```
